Financial Performance

Step-by-step savings calculation from historical benchmark to earned savings/losses.

Step Description Value MSSP Median Peer Median
1 Assigned Beneficiaries 28,842 p78 13,159 28,971
2 Historical Benchmark (per capita) $11,649 p54 $11,439 $11,985
3 Regional Adjustment +$276
4 Prior Savings Adjustment +-
5 Adjustment Category Regional Adjustment
6 Updated Benchmark (per capita) $14,394 p73 $13,279 $13,972
7 Total Benchmark (all beneficiaries) $407,774,744
8 Total Expenditure (all beneficiaries) $393,487,709
9 Per Capita Expenditure (PY) $13,890 p76 $12,693 $13,370
10 Generated Savings / Losses $14,287,035 $6,931,306 —
11 Savings Rate 3.50% p41 4.21% 3.33%
12 Minimum Savings Rate (threshold) 0.50%
13 Guardrail Applied —
14 Final Shared Savings Rate 75.00%
15 Final Shared Loss Rate 40.00%
16 Earned Savings / Losses $10,500,970 $3,685,876 —
Revenue-to-Expense Category High Revenue

Annual per-beneficiary expenditure across benchmark years (BY1–BY3) and the performance year (PY). Includes Parts A and B FFS spending.

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Risk-Adj. Expected Difference

Aged, Non-Dual $10,292 $8,991 $10,618 $12,841 ↑ $12,517 +$324
Total $13,890 $12,693 $13,370

Risk Scores

Hierarchical Condition Category risk scores. A score of 1.0 = national average. Below 1.0 means the population is healthier than average.

CMS-HCC Risk Scores

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Coding Gap MSSP Med.
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 1.068 1.072 1.096 1.047 → +0.005 0.967
Disabled 0.987 0.975 0.995 1.029 ↑ -0.069 0.934
Aged, Dual-Eligible 1.075 1.003 1.014 0.993 ↓ -0.031 0.954
Aged, Non-Dual 1.024 0.998 1.035 1.038 → +0.006 0.983

Demographic Risk Scores

Demographic-only risk scores (age/sex/Medicaid status). Compared with HCC risk scores, the difference reflects clinical coding intensity.

Population Segment BY3PY
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) — 1.042
Disabled — 1.098
Aged, Dual-Eligible — 1.024
Aged, Non-Dual — 1.032

Risk Redistribution Weights (PY)

Fraction of the ACO's total risk attributable to each population segment.

ESRD Weight 3.5%
Disabled Weight 9.0%
Aged Dual Weight 13.9%
Aged Non-Dual Weight 73.6%

Utilization — Admissions & Visits Psychiatric Admissions (per 1,000) * 3 ADM_Psych
Utilization — Admissions & Visits Rehab Admissions (per 1,000) 21 15 ADM_Rehab
Utilization — Admissions & Visits Short-Term Acute Admissions (per 1,000) 280 229 ADM_S_Trm
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Admissions (per 1,000) 56 40 P_SNF_ADM
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Average Length of Stay (days) 23 27 p4 SNF_LOS
Utilization — Admissions & Visits SNF Average Payment per Stay $12,988 $15,338 p13 SNF_PayperStay
Methodology

Data source: MSSP ACO Performance PY2024 (dataset ID: mssp-performance). Vintage: PY2024. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 476.

MSSP ACO Performance reports financial and quality performance for Accountable Care Organizations participating in the Medicare Shared Savings Program. Savings/losses are calculated against risk-adjusted, regionally-weighted benchmarks.

Full methodology →

MIT License. Free. No ads. No login.
